schema_document_encoding.string_escape_rule: quote and reverse-solidus use backslash escapes; U+0000 through U+001F use lowercase six-byte \u00xx; all other Unicode scalar values use direct UTF-8
schema_document_encoding.definition_inclusion: include the transitive closure of root $ref targets; emit included definitions once in global definition_order

list_projects.name: list_projects
list_projects.title: List Relay projects
list_projects.description: List bounded Relay Project summaries available for operation-packet creation. This tool does not select a Project or expose repository contents.

get_operation_packet.name: get_operation_packet
get_operation_packet.title: Get operation packet
get_operation_packet.description: Return the exact immutable operation packet and current lifecycle selected by `expected_packet_id`, including retained superseded or closed packets.

create_operation_packet.name: create_operation_packet
create_operation_packet.title: Create operation packet
create_operation_packet.description: Create one complete immutable independent operation packet for an operation allowed by this surface, acquiring any bounded direct uploaded inputs atomically. Relay publishes only a fully ready packet and recovers the same result on retry.

refresh_operation_packet.name: refresh_operation_packet
refresh_operation_packet.title: Refresh operation packet
refresh_operation_packet.description: Create one complete immutable replacement for the supplied active packet, acquire any bounded direct uploaded inputs atomically, supersede only that packet, and recover the same replacement on retry.

close_operation_packet.name: close_operation_packet
close_operation_packet.title: Close operation packet
close_operation_packet.description: Close only the supplied active packet without deleting retained packet evidence or changing any unrelated packet; retries recover the same close result.

read_operation_input.name: read_operation_input
read_operation_input.title: Read operation input
read_operation_input.description: Read bounded exact bytes and identity metadata for one input bound to the supplied active or retained operation packet.

list_operation_repositories.name: list_operation_repositories
list_operation_repositories.title: List operation repositories
list_operation_repositories.description: List packet-bound repositories, configured-branch resolutions, primary revisions, trees, and authorized named anchors with deterministic continuation.

list_source_tree.name: list_source_tree
list_source_tree.title: List source tree
list_source_tree.description: List a bounded deterministic page of committed tree entries using lossless Git path identities.

read_source_path.name: read_source_path
read_source_path.title: Read source path bytes
read_source_path.description: Read an exact bounded byte range of one path identified by a packet-bound Git path ID.

search_source.name: search_source
search_source.title: Search committed source
search_source.description: Search exact packet-authorized committed blobs using text literal, fixed RE2, or literal byte mode and prefix-only byte path filters.

read_source_text.name: read_source_text
read_source_text.title: Read source text
read_source_text.description: Read an exact line-addressed UTF-8 range with byte continuation inside oversized lines and preserved CR content.

read_source_blob.name: read_source_blob
read_source_blob.title: Read source blob
read_source_blob.description: Read an exact bounded byte range from one committed blob without text reinterpretation.

get_source_commit.name: get_source_commit
get_source_commit.title: Get source commit
get_source_commit.description: Read exact raw commit-object bytes plus bounded structured indexes and complete parent continuation.

list_source_history.name: list_source_history
list_source_history.title: List source history
list_source_history.description: List a bounded deterministic page of packet-authorized commit or exact-byte path history.

compare_source.name: compare_source
compare_source.title: Compare committed source
compare_source.description: Compare two packet-authorized revisions and return deterministic changed-path metadata using lossless path identities.

read_source_diff.name: read_source_diff
read_source_diff.title: Read source diff
read_source_diff.description: Read exact bounded diff bytes for one packet-authorized comparison without silent truncation.

list_projects.title: List Relay projects
